response.justification: Aisha brings extensive full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud tools like AWS CDK, with direct exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and testing frameworks — aligning well with the role’s core stack and responsibilities, though limited explicit use of Nest.js, Vitest, or Kotlin/Java raises minor stack gaps.
strengths: Proven full-stack ownership across frontend and backend systems
Hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling
Strong testing and DevOps culture (CI/CD, Docker, GitLab, TDD)
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in experience
Limited evidence of Kotlin/Java usage in recent roles
German language proficiency is basic, may impact local collaboration
